metadata.title: EstiHub - Estonia tax and housing insights
metadata.description: Compare Estonian tax regimes and explore Tallinn rental data for expats and entrepreneurs.

header.tagline: Estonia essentials for builders and expats

hero.title: Plan your work, taxes, and next apartment in Estonia.
hero.description: EstiHub brings practical tax comparisons and Tallinn rental signals into one fast, multilingual workspace for people building their life or company in Estonia.

proof.tax: Compare employment, board member, FIE, and entrepreneur account regimes.
proof.housing: Explore district-level Tallinn rent data as the housing dashboard grows.
proof.i18n: Use the product in English, Estonian, or Russian from day one.

status.title: Backend status
status.description: Server-rendered health check from the FastAPI service.
status.onlineHelp: The API responded successfully and is ready for frontend integrations.
status.offlineHelp: The page is still available; start the backend locally to restore live data.

metadata.title: Tallinn rent dashboard - EstiHub
metadata.description: Compare mock 2026 Tallinn rent levels by district for one-, two-, and three-room apartments.

hero.title: Tallinn rents by district, shaped for quick decisions.
hero.description: A compact mock-data view of average apartment rents and utilities across eight Tallinn districts for the MVP housing slice.

chart.title: Average 2-room rent
chart.description: Monthly rent in euros by district.

table.title: District rent table
table.description: Average monthly rent and utility estimates. Coordinates stay in the API response and are not shown here.

states.unavailableDescription: The page is still available. Start the backend locally to restore the Tallinn rent dashboard.

metadata.title: Estonian tax calculator - EstiHub
metadata.description: Compare net income across Estonian employment, board member, FIE, and entrepreneur account tax regimes.

hero.title: Compare Estonian tax regimes before you choose how to work.
hero.description: Enter monthly gross income and pension pillar settings to see net income, employer cost, effective rate, and tax breakdown for four MVP regimes.

form.title: Inputs
form.description: The API calculates all regimes from the same monthly gross income.

empty.title: No calculation yet
empty.description: Submit the form to compare net income across the four regimes.

errors.title: Calculation failed
errors.api: The API rejected the request. Check the input and try again.
errors.network: The backend is unavailable. Start the FastAPI service locally and try again.

comparison.title: Net income comparison
comparison.description: Bars are scaled against the best net income result.

results.cardDescription: Monthly values returned by the tax API.
